legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity/step bootstrap, base-image media picker, hotspot drag/resize runtime, Preview/Reader/Publish/Instructor, persistence-after-reload, or a11y flows.
